title: Infosys Collaborates with Citizens on AI-First Innovation Hub in Bengaluru
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a collaboration with Citizens Financial Group to support the launch of Citizens' AI-first Innovation Hub in Bengaluru, India. Infosys is one of Citizens' strategic delivery partners supporting AI development and will contribute AI, cloud, and cybersecurity expertise. The engagement uses Infosys Topaz Fabric to support scalable, agent-ready banking capabilities aimed at accelerating new financial products and digital services. No deal value, duration, or financial impact was disclosed.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting, today announced its collaboration with Citizens (NYSE: CFG), one of the oldest and largest financial institutions in the US, to support the launch of the bank's AI-first Innovation Hub in Bengaluru, India.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Citizens on AI-First Innovation Hub to Accelerate the Future of Banking
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the main collaboration, counterparty, and location of the AI-first Innovation Hub.

important_text_spans.text: As one of Citizens strategic delivery partners supporting AI development, Infosys will contribute its AI, cloud, and cybersecurity expertise to help advance Citizens' AI-first operating model.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Citizens on AI-First Innovation Hub to Accelerate the Future of Banking
important_text_spans.reason: Shows Infosys' role and capabilities contributed to the engagement.

important_text_spans.text: Leveraging Infosys Topaz Fabric, a specialized agentic services suite featuring a multi-layer AI fabric that integrates infrastructure, models, data, applications, and workflows into a cohesive, agent-ready ecosystem, Infosys will support the development of scalable, agent-ready capabilities designed to simplify and increase the speed of delivery of new financial products and digital services.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Citizens on AI-First Innovation Hub to Accelerate the Future of Banking
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the product/platform relevance and stated business purpose of the collaboration.
